Hero.title: Build your next
Hero.description: Professional development for students, startups, and businesses. Portfolio sites, e‑commerce, and custom full stack solutions—with structured plans and exclusive coupons.
Hero.welcomeQuote: "Your vision, our code let's build something great together."

Auth.signInDescription: Sign in to your account to apply coupons and get quotes.
Auth.signUpDescription: Sign up to apply coupons and request quotes for our services.

About.title: About me
About.description: My name is Alfayad S. I am a full stack developer focused on building modern web applications—from responsive frontends to scalable backends and APIs. I work with React, Next.js, Node.js, and databases to deliver clean, maintainable solutions for students, startups, and businesses. Whether you need a portfolio site, e-commerce platform, or a custom app, I help bring ideas to life with clear structure and quality code.

WelcomeModal.title: Create an account for exclusive coupon offers
WelcomeModal.description: Sign up or log in to get access to coupon codes and special discounts on our development services. Create your account to apply coupons at checkout and save on your project.

Quote.title: Request a quote
Quote.subtitle: Select services and tiers. We'll send you a formal quotation shortly.
Quote.successMessage: We've received your request. We'll send you a formal quotation by email shortly.
Quote.quotationTypeQuestion: How would you like to receive this quotation?
Quote.viewOnlyDescription: You can view and download the PDF as soon as we send you the link. No booking confirmation step.
Quote.confirmViaAdminLabel: Confirm my order when admin accepts
Quote.confirmViaAdminDescription: You will be able to view and download the PDF only after we confirm your booking.
Quote.viewOnlyWaitMessage: Admin will send the quotation soon. Please wait till the next 24 hours.
